evidence_policy: Public crawl evidence only. Records are draft reconciliation data; employment, lifecycle, and publication require authoritative review.
safe_import_plan: Load every file into a staging schema keyed by source URL and retain captured_at/raw_file.
Resolve Person identity by authoritative employee ID first; use source profile URL next. Normalised-name matches are review candidates only.

Review portrait-linked profile aliases before import. Where exactly one alias remains in the current sitemap, treat it only as the canonical-route candidate until identity is authoritatively confirmed.
Do not let crawl data overwrite HR-controlled Person, employment status, Appointment, rank, start/end dates, or institutional email.
Create or update PublicProfile and EducationCredential records as drafts; keep each extracted value attached to its public source URL.
Map appointments only after the unit relationship is verified. Keep school-only and unassigned programme relationships in a review queue.
Treat generic admissions/info email and footer phone values as institutional contact points, never as personal contact fields.
Keep image URLs as provenance references until licensing, freshness, identity match, and derivative-file handling are reviewed.
Review all duplicate-name, duplicate-photo, duplicate-title, exact-content, missing-capture, and relationship conflicts before publication.

After review, import in dependency order: FacultyDivision, School, Department, Programme, Person, Appointment, PublicProfile, EducationCredential, research/facility memberships, happenings, documents.
